<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_id}/pay_schedules/preview"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Provides a preview of a pay schedule with the specified parameters for the next 18 months.

scope: `pay_schedules:write`
